name: Basic Pie Shell (Lo Cal)
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Water (may need up to 4 Tablespoons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the shortening into the flour and salt until fine crumbs.
2. Add water, 1 tablespoon at a time, until a ball forms.
3. Wrap in plastic wrap and chill for one hour.
4. Roll out to fit a 9-inch pie pan.
5. Bake at 425°F for 10-12 minutes or leave unbaked if the recipe calls for an unbaked shell.
Note: This recipe makes enough for 8 servings (120 calories per serving). Source: Diabetic Dessert Cookbook.
